subcodes.first_line: The verses have been revealed in such measure as none can reckon them save God, the Numberer, the All-Knowing, and they have been scattered throughout the lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات علی شان لایحصیها الا الله المحصی العلیم و تفرقت فی البلاد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @development of capacity and readiness, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action
